TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-23-2012 IN 206, THE COURT'S RECONSIDERATION HEARING ON PLAINTIFF GLORIA ARGUETA'S APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES HELD. THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF GLORIA ARGUETA'S FEE WAIVER IS ENDED AS OF 7/23/12. ALL FUTURE FEES MUST BE PAID AT THE TIME OF FILING. PLAINTIFF MUST PAY BY 4 PM ON 8/3/12 ALL COURT FEES OWED IN THIS CASE. MRS. ARGUETA REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT HER ADDRESS HAS NOT CHANGED. THE ORDER WILL BE MAILED BY THE COURT.
